---
title: E. Reference data
---

Two files that the pipeline reads on startup to understand your site's data model
and local code vocabulary.

- **[model.json](reference-data-model.qmd)** — defines the attribute and observation model; copy the default to get started.
- **[mappers.xlsx](reference-data-mappers.qmd)** — translates your site's local short codes into BigPicture-standard coded attributes.
- **[Staining mapping](reference-data-staining.qmd)** — SNOMED CT codes, mapping modes, and naming conventions for staining attributes.
